title: elatine hydropiper var. triandra
intro: Elatine hydropiper var. triandra, also known as Triandrus, is a type of waterwort plant that belongs to the Elatinaceae family. It is an aquatic plant that grows in shallow water and has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elatine hydropiper var. triandra include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Elatine hydropiper var. triandra can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some traditional herbal practices, it is also used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
